device_name: Aquilion ONE (TSX-306A/3) V10.4 with Spectral Imaging System
intended_use: This device is indicated to acquire and display cross-sectional volumes of the whole body, to include the head, with the capability to image whole organs in a single rotation. Whole organs include, bu
intended_use_full: This device is indicated to acquire and display cross-sectional volumes of the whole body, to include the head, with the capability to image whole organs in a single rotation. Whole organs include, but are not limited to brain, heart, pancreas, etc. The Aquilion ONE has the capability to provide volume sets of the entire organ. These volume sets can be used to perform specialized studies, using indicated software/hardware, of the whole organ by a trained and qualified physician.
target_condition: Various anatomical regions requiring cross-sectional imaging including cardiac, abdominal, pelvic, chest, lung, brain, and extremities applications
ground_truth: Phantoms (MITA-FDA LCD Body phantom, 33cm Gammex dual energy CT phantom) and clinical image review by American Board Certified Radiologist
other_metrics: Contrast-to-Noise Ratio (CNR): 150% improvement for iodine with Spectral 70keV relative to single energy AIDR at same dose; Noise reduction: 50% noise reduction for Spectral 70keV compared to same dose single energy images; Iodine concentration reduction: 60% reduction at 60keV relative to 120kVp single energy AIDR; Dose neutral: Spectral 70keV demonstrated dose neutrality with single energy AIDR 120kVp
